assertions.description: Visiting an arbitrary page does not inject any global named after Chrome's welcome flow (this removal is internal to Chrome's first-run setup; sanity check that nothing leaked to the web).
navigator.userAgent remains exposed; this change does not modify the navigator surface.
location.href remains readable; the removal is internal.
history.pushState remains exposed (the removal does not affect navigation surfaces).
No window.firstRunTabs property is exposed (the internal initial-prefs mechanism has no web counterpart).
